sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kong sapna ngai in, tu’n hong hehpih in,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Inn pan gamlapi ka pial khin;
Tu’n hong la in, hong ciahpih’n Na inn

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Zan khuamial sung ka belh ding ka nei lo,
Khatvei Nong et hinna khuavak hizo,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: gamdai a ka khe zong gimzo ta,
Ka dak leh Na it mai mu zenzen a,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Na nial ngei kei, lung tamkhamte’ thuumna,
Na ngai in lung niamkhiat a kong thumna,
